data.content: Implementation review rejected: the bulk terminal-state Select dropdown works for one-shot use but the reset fix (commit 6a4d2c1b 'Fix bulk state dropdown reset') was not included in merge 217ae275 to main. The fix adds useState + key-based remount so the Select resets after each apply, allowing the same state to be applied consecutively. This was the exact bug flagged by the user. Action: cherry-pick or re-apply 6a4d2c1b and merge to main, then verify the test assertions for key={bulkStateSelectKey} pass.
